summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 171 Revenue Engine features: Fidelity HUD Boost system, AI Content Broker marketplace. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (1 skipped - no purchasable content from other users). Frontend: All features verified working.
seed_data_creation: User has active 167h Ultra boost, 6 created content assets (victory_mantra and recovery_frequency types)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 171 Revenue Engine features fully working. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/fidelity/status (tier_id, tier_label, discount_pct, boost status, 3 boost_packs, free_trial_eligible), POST /api/fidelity/boost (dust/credits currency), POST /api/fidelity/activate-trial (7-day Ultra), POST /api/content-broker/generate (victory_mantra, recovery_frequency, cosmic_blend, group_immersion), GET /api/content-broker/catalog (tier-based pricing), POST /api/content-broker/purchase (95% creator / 5% resonance fee), GET /api/content-broker/my-content (created + purchased). Frontend verified: Fidelity HUD icon in nav with timer badge (167h), Fidelity panel with Base Tier, Ultra Active status, 3 boost packs with Dust/Credits options, Trade Circle 8 tabs (Browse, Broker, Content, Escrow, Avatar, My Listings, Offers, Karma), AI Content Broker with Marketplace/Generate/My Content sub-tabs, type filters (All, Recovery Frequency, Victory Mantra, Group Immersion, Cosmic Blend), content generation buttons for all 4 types.

fidelity_status_api.GET /api/fidelity/status: Returns tier_id, tier_label, discount_pct, fidelity_boost_active, fidelity_boost_hours_remaining, fidelity_boost_level, boost_packs (3), free_trial_eligible

fidelity_boost_api.POST /api/fidelity/boost: Accepts pack_id and currency (dust/credits), deducts balance, activates boost, stacks with existing boost
fidelity_boost_api.tier_discount_applied: Discount applied to boost cost based on user tier

fidelity_trial_api.POST /api/fidelity/activate-trial: Activates 7-day (168h) Ultra trial for eligible new users

content_broker_generate_api.POST /api/content-broker/generate: Generates AI content based on type

content_broker_catalog_api.GET /api/content-broker/catalog: Returns listed assets with tier-based pricing

content_broker_purchase_api.POST /api/content-broker/purchase: Deducts credits from buyer, credits creator (95%), platform gets 5% resonance fee
content_broker_purchase_api.validation: Cannot purchase own content, cannot purchase twice

content_broker_my_content_api.GET /api/content-broker/my-content: Returns created and purchased content arrays with counts

fidelity_hud_ui.nav_icon: Lightning bolt icon with timer badge when boost active
fidelity_hud_ui.panel: Shows tier (Base/Premium/Elite), Ultra Active status with hours remaining, 3 boost packs with Dust/Credits options
fidelity_hud_ui.upsell: Shows upgrade message for Base tier users
